title: Opening for Store Manager at Bikanervala Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Bikanervala Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Bikanervala Advisory Limited in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bikanervala Advisory Limited:
Bikanervala Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
